summary: **Status: PROVISIONAL design doc** (designer-1, 2026-07-11). Written for maintainer issue #20. It answers two maintainer questions — (1) how kernel-v0's Π-readout rules were derived and why they over-constrain, and (2) whether we can auto-generate the type/inference layer from a foundational ontology such as UFO — and states a recommendation with decision points. **No feasibility conclusion on either value thesis is stated or implied anywhere in this document; verdicts belong to the maintainer a
title: Foundational-ontology import as the type/axiom source — design doc
